subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling of God's rose-garden of love, thy loving father requested that the pen of 'Abdu'l-Bahá pen this letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال گلشن محبت الله پدر مهربان خواهش نگارش این نامه نمود تا قلم عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
